glosses.ja: クラスメート; 友だち

sentences.target: Mon camarade de classe arrive toujours en retard.
sentences.reading: /mɔ̃ ka.ma.ʁad də klas a.ʁiv tu.ʒuʁ ɑ̃ ʁə.taʁ/

translations.fr: Mon camarade de classe arrive toujours en retard.
translations.ipa: /mɔ̃ ka.ma.ʁad də klas a.ʁiv tu.ʒuʁ ɑ̃ ʁə.taʁ/
translations.es: Mi compañero de clase siempre llega tarde.
translations.de: Mein Klassenkamerad kommt immer zu spät.
translations.it: Il mio compagno di classe arriva sempre in ritardo.
translations.ko: 내 반 친구는 항상 늦게 와요.
translations.pt: Meu colega de classe sempre chega atrasado.
translations.he: בן הכיתה שלי תמיד מגיע באיחור.
translations.tr: Sınıf arkadaşım her zaman geç geliyor.
translations.vi: Bạn cùng lớp của tôi luôn đến muộn.
translations.nl: Mijn klasgenoot komt altijd te laat.
translations.hi: मेरा सहपाठी हमेशा देर से आता है.
translations.pl: Mój kolega z klasy zawsze się spóźnia.
translations.nb: Klassekameraten min kommer alltid for sent.
translations.sv: Min klasskamrat kommer alltid för sent.
translations.ro: Colegul meu de clasă întârzie mereu.
translations.da: Min klassekammerat kommer altid for sent.
translations.ja: 私のクラスメートはいつも遅刻します。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (masculine singular), modifies 'camarade' and marks 1st-person possessor.
Common-gender noun; head of the NP 'Mon camarade de classe' functioning as subject.
Preposition introducing the noun complement 'classe' (type/kind specification).
Noun governed by 'de' to form the complement 'de classe' modifying 'camarade'.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject NP.
Adverb of frequency modifying 'arrive'.
Preposition in the fixed expression 'en retard', introducing the noun 'retard' to form an adverbial phrase.
Noun complement of 'en'; together 'en retard' functions as an adverbial meaning 'late'.

sentences.target: Je parle avec mon camarade au café.
sentences.reading: /ʒə paʁl a.vɛk mɔ̃ ka.ma.ʁad o ka.fe/

translations.fr: Je parle avec mon camarade au café.
translations.ipa: /ʒə paʁl a.vɛk mɔ̃ ka.ma.ʁad o ka.fe/
translations.en: I’m talking with my friend at the café.
translations.es: Estoy hablando con mi amigo en el café.
translations.de: Ich spreche mit meinem Freund im Café.
translations.it: Sto parlando con il mio amico al bar.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在咖啡馆和朋友聊天。
translations.yue: 我喺咖啡店同朋友傾偈。
translations.ru: Я разговариваю с другом в кафе.
translations.pt: Estou conversando com meu amigo no café.
translations.he: אני מדבר עם חבר שלי בבית הקפה.
translations.vi: Tôi đang nói chuyện với bạn ở quán cà phê.
translations.ar: أنا أتحدث مع صديقي في المقهى.
translations.nl: Ik praat met mijn vriend in het café.
translations.uk: Я розмовляю з другом у кафе.
translations.hi: मैं कैफ़े में अपने दोस्त से बात कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Rozmawiam z moim przyjacielem w kawiarni.
translations.el: Μιλάω με τον φίλο μου στην καφετέρια.
translations.nb: Jeg snakker med vennen min på kafé.
translations.id: Saya sedang berbicara dengan teman saya di kafe.
translations.sv: Jag pratar med min vän på kafé.
translations.ro: Vorbesc cu prietenul meu la cafenea.
translations.da: Jeg taler med min ven på café.
translations.ja: 私はカフェで友達と話しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'parle'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes prepositional complements here.
Preposition introducing the comitative phrase 'avec mon camarade'.
Possessive determiner (masculine singular) modifying 'camarade'.
Noun head of the NP complement of 'avec'.
Preposition 'à' contracted with the article 'le' (à + le); introduces the locative NP 'café'.
Noun head of the NP functioning as a locative complement with 'au'.

sentences.target: Tu envoies ce livre à ton camarade.
sentences.reading: /ty ɑ̃.vwa sə livʁ a tɔ̃ ka.ma.ʁad/

translations.fr: Tu envoies ce livre à ton camarade.
translations.ipa: /ty ɑ̃.vwa sə livʁ a tɔ̃ ka.ma.ʁad/
translations.en: You’re sending this book to your friend.
translations.es: Estás enviando este libro a tu amigo.
translations.de: Du schickst dieses Buch an deinen Freund.
translations.it: Stai mandando questo libro al tuo amico.
translations.zh-Hans: 你正在把这本书寄给你的朋友。
translations.yue: 你正將呢本書寄畀你嘅朋友。
translations.ru: Ты отправляешь эту книгу своему другу.
translations.pt: Você está enviando este livro para seu amigo.
translations.he: אתה שולח את הספר הזה לחבר שלך.
translations.vi: Bạn đang gửi cuốn sách này cho bạn của mình.
translations.ar: أنت ترسل هذا الكتاب إلى صديقك.
translations.nl: Je stuurt dit boek naar je vriend.
translations.uk: Ти надсилаєш цю книжку своєму другу.
translations.hu: Ezt a könyvet elküldöd a barátodnak.
translations.hi: तुम यह किताब अपने दोस्त को भेज रहे हो.
translations.el: Στέλνεις αυτό το βιβλίο στον φίλο σου.
translations.nb: Du sender denne boken til vennen din.
translations.id: Kamu sedang mengirim buku ini kepada temanmu.
translations.sv: Du skickar den här boken till din vän.
translations.da: Du sender denne bog til din ven.
translations.ja: この本を友達に送っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'envoies'.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; governs a direct object and an indirect object.
Demonstrative determiner (masculine singular) modifying 'livre'.
Noun; head of the NP functioning as the direct object of 'envoies'.
Preposition introducing the indirect object phrase 'à ton camarade'.
Possessive determiner (masculine singular) modifying 'camarade'.
Noun; head of the NP functioning as the indirect object of 'à'.

sentences.target: Nous cherchons notre camarade dans la cour.
sentences.reading: /nu ʃɛʁ.ʃɔ̃ nɔtʁ ka.ma.ʁad dɑ̃ la kuʁ/

translations.fr: Nous cherchons notre camarade dans la cour.
translations.ipa: /nu ʃɛʁ.ʃɔ̃ nɔtʁ ka.ma.ʁad dɑ̃ la kuʁ/
translations.en: We’re looking for our friend in the courtyard.
translations.es: Estamos buscando a nuestro amigo en el patio.
translations.de: Wir suchen unseren Freund im Hof.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando il nostro amico nel cortile.
translations.ko: 우리는 안뜰에서 우리 친구를 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在院子里找我们的朋友。
translations.yue: 我哋喺院子度搵我哋嘅朋友。
translations.ru: Мы ищем нашего друга во дворе.
translations.pt: Estamos procurando nosso amigo no pátio.
translations.he: אנחנו מחפשים את החבר שלנו בחצר.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm bạn của mình ở sân.
translations.ar: نحن نبحث عن صديقنا في الساحة.
translations.nl: We zoeken onze vriend op de binnenplaats.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо нашого друга у дворі.
translations.hi: हम अपने दोस्त को आंगन में ढूंढ़ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε τον φίλο μας στην αυλή.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter vennen vår i skolegården.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari teman kami di halaman.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter vår vän på gården.
translations.ro: Îl căutăm pe prietenul nostru în curte.
translations.da: Vi leder efter vores ven i gården.
translations.ja: 私たちは中庭で友達を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of 'cherchons'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive, taking 'notre camarade' as direct object.
Possessive determiner (singular, gender-invariant) modifying 'camarade'.
Noun; head of the NP functioning as the direct object of 'cherchons'.
Preposition introducing the locative complement 'dans la cour'.
Definite article (feminine singular) modifying 'cour'.
Noun; head of the NP complement of 'dans' indicating location.
